public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as communal arbiter of loss claims.
appearance: Practical layers, inspection tools, and a habit of carrying evidence or notes keep inquiry visibly close at hand.
manner: Asks more than they answer, preserving doubt until the evidence can bear weight. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a communal arbiter of loss claims still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of communal arbiter of loss claims in and around Whitebridge Commune, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Whitebridge Commune workable through the obligations of communal arbiter of loss claims while managing the immediate pressure of bridge icing in Sheresh Communes.
hidden_pressure: Must keep suspicion disciplined so that inquiry does not collapse into factional theater. Around Whitebridge Commune, that usually means carrying bridge icing, refugee surges, missing expeditions without letting the role of communal arbiter of loss claims visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Working with Arbiter Nyra Thawmark can place the party inside an active inquiry where every answer creates new exposure.
Arbiter Nyra Thawmark can share a strong lead if the party retrieves testimony, material proof, or a missing intermediary.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V30_3 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Communal Arbiter of Loss Claims, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Sheresh Communes.

how_they_can_help: Arbiter Nyra Thawmark can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
